headline: Assessing Hubbell (HUBB) Valuation After Strong Q4 Growth And Softer Full Year EPS Outlook
summary: Hubbell (HUBB) is back in focus after reporting Q4 results that featured double-digit growth in net sales, operating profit, and diluted EPS, along with full-year earnings guidance that came in below analyst expectations. See our latest analysis for Hubbell. The Q4 release and guidance reset have arrived alongside a strong run in the shares, with a 30 day share price return of 14.68% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 53.54%, pointing to momentum that has been building rather than...
